ab: Ali’, kiya su’ i imuwag qu?
en: Ali’, are you home?

ab: kiya, nabuwibuwi patgi imu.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Ali’, kiya su’ i imuwag qu?
en: Ali, are you home?

ab: ukas imu i Ali’, Iwal kuwing, kiya a waw qu? muwah i Ali’ ga panqaquanay mu.
ch: B:Ali’不在家耶，我是Iwal，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Ali’。
en: Ali’ is not at home. I am Iwal. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: ima’ cimu?
en: Who are you?

ab: aki’, Amuy ru Ali’ cami, gawahani cami cu balihun.
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Amuy 和 Ali’，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Amuy and Ali’, please open the door for us.

ab: ima’?
en: Who is it?

ab: Buya’ kuwing, muwah kuwing kumiyum i Yupas.
en: I am Buya’, I am here for Yupas.

ab: aki’, muwah kuwing mitaal isu’ la.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: ingasu su’ cubalay ini’ uwah la, lungulungun mi su’ cubalay.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Ali’, muwah kuwing kumiyum isu’ magunawu’ la.
en: Ali, I am here to play with you.

ab: nabuwibuwi patgi imuwag, ingasu mi su’ nagaun la.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: pinumuwa’ mu ku bunga’ kahani, qaneq cu mama’!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: lalbing cubalay ku bunga’ kahani.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: ibuwi! pinumuwa’ mu ku uquuqu’ kahani, qaneq cu mama’.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: lalbing cubalay ku uquuqu’ kahani.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: tahunak! pinumuwa’ mu ku qatiyay kahani, qaneq cu mama’.
ch: A:請坐!這是我種的有機玉米吃看看。
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: waw! lalbing cubalay ku qatiyay kahani.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: paqaneq su’ cu iyuk qu?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: aqeh kuwing maneq cu iyuk, maniqay kuwing cu pingkwo’.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: paqaneq su’ cu pingkan qu.
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: uwal, balayq mu.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: tagaqanay mi su’ cu uquuqu’.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: mahuway su’! payux cubalay a booq naku uquuqu’ kahani.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: alanay mi su’ cu qusiya’.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: mahuway su’!
en: Thank you.

ab: kapayux i maneq, payux tinahuk mu ka raramat.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: waw! sahahiya’ sawkan ru sahahiya’ cubalay uwi i niqun.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: kapayux i maneq, payux na’ i runi.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: iqaat kuwing paubaga’ la yo!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: kapayux i maneq, payux na’ i runi.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: payux cubalay niqun mu la, iqaat mausa’ i niqun laa.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
